name: ground vanilla beans
description: Ground vanilla beans provide natural vanilla flavor and speckled appearance in food products.
raw_text: Premium ice cream, made with 100% real vanilla & ground vanilla beans: Milkfat and nonfat milk, sugar, corn syrup, high fructose corn syrup, sweetcream buttermilk, whey, contains less than 2% of natural flavor, ground vanilla bean, guar gum, mono & diglycerides, xanthan gum, polysorbate 80, cellulose gum, carrageenan, annatto (color). | Real premium old-fashioned homestyle vanilla ice cream churned with real ground beans, homestyle vanilla: Milk, cream, liquid sugar, skim milk, buttermilk, corn syrup, vanilla bean seeds, natural flavor, mono-and diglycerides, guar gum, cellulose gum, carrageenan, dextrose. | Vanilla frozen yogurt with ground vanilla beans, vanilla bean: Skim milk, liquid sugar [sugar, water], cream, corn syrup, whey, tapioca syrup solids, cultured skim milk, guar gum, locust bean gum, tara gum, vanilla extract, ground vanilla beans, active yogurt cultures [l. bulgaricus, s. thermophilus], water, probiotic culture [bacillus coagulans gbi-30 6086].
